## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve or what improvement does it make? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test addition or improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? What commands can a reviewer run to verify? -->

**Tests added or modified:**

## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] No source file exceeds 700 lines
- [ ] No `shell=True` in any subprocess call
- [ ] No hardcoded file system paths
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
